# shell

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: App shell for the debug tools. Registers the /debug app entry and defines DebugApp.Sidebar/Toolbar slots.
- Web:
  - Slots: `DebugApp.Sidebar`, `DebugApp.Toolbar`
  - Contributes: `Apps.App` "Debug" → `DebugLayout`
  - Uses: `apps.Apps`, `layouts/miller.MillerColumns`, `primitives/app-shell.AppShellLayout`, `primitives/slot-render.defineRenderSlot`
  - Exports: Values: `DebugApp`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Slot contributors: `backup`, `broadcasts`, `claude-cli-calls`, `events-test`, `live-state-health`, `logs`, `memory`, `profiling`, `queue`, `recover`, `reports`, `slow-ops`, `worktree-cleanup`
  - Imported by: `backup`, `conversations/recover`, `debug/broadcasts`, `debug/claude-cli-calls`, `debug/live-state-health`, `debug/logs`, `debug/memory`, `debug/profiling`, `debug/queue`, `debug/reports`, `debug/slow-ops`, `debug/worktree-cleanup`, `infra/events-test`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
